Tips & instructions

Playback

Use the Play/Pause button or press Spacebar to control playback.

Timeline control

Drag the vertical marker or the colored range selector to scrub through the video.

Keyboard shortcuts

Use ← / → for fine seeking.

Use Shift + ← / → for larger jumps.

Fine-tuning

Type exact times into the input fields. Then use ↑ / ↓ to make small adjustments.
